title: How UFOs Actually Fly!
summary: This interview excerpt discusses UFO flight characteristics, specifically focusing on 'fast walkers' - objects detected entering Earth's orbit that demonstrate extreme acceleration capabilities far beyond conventional aircraft like the SR-71.

key_claims.claim: Fast Walkers are UFOs that enter the outer layer of Earth's orbit where Air Force defenses operate above 50,000 feet
A UFO descended from above 50,000 feet to 50 feet in less than a second
The acceleration required for observed UFO maneuvers would be lethal to humans
An SR-71 traveling at Mach 3 with 50-mile visibility would take about a minute to disappear from view, while the observed UFO disappeared in one second
